parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, status: $json.status || 400, error: $json.error || 'Unauthorized', supabase_raw: $json.supabase_raw || null }) }}

meta.notes: Admin 1-click client provisioning. POST /webhook/admin/provision-client with { lead_id, products?, role? }. Admin-gated. Reads the lead, extracts product from notes (or accepts override), UPSERTs into auth_users with onboarding_status='account_created'. Returns auth_user_id so the UI can confirm. Designed to be called from a 'Provision client' button on the lead-detail page.
